dares: Kiss me on the body part you like most.
Sit on my lap for the next two rounds.
Whisper exactly where you want to kiss me next.
Give me a slow 20-second neck kiss.
Let me hold your chin while you kiss me hard for 15 seconds.
Run your fingers through my hair and call me something dirty.
Trace one finger from my neck to my waist.
Bite my lower lip once and smile.
Pull me close and grind on me for 15 seconds.
Kiss me like you missed me for a week.
Lick your lips while staring at me and say what you want.
Let me choose where you kiss me for the next dare.
Hold my face and give me three kisses: soft, slower, deepest.
Close your eyes and let me lead one kiss anywhere I choose.
Kiss my palm and tell me what you're thinking.
Link your fingers with mine and kiss me without letting go for 20 seconds.
Nuzzle my nose, then kiss me like you mean it.
Pick a spot on my neck and kiss there for 10 seconds.
Stand behind me, wrap your arms around my waist, kiss my shoulder.
Kiss me in slow motion for 15 seconds — no laughing.
Whisper your favorite thing about my lips, then prove it with a kiss.
Give me a nose kiss, then a real one.
Kiss my cheek and work your way to my lips in five steps.
Rest your forehead on mine and breathe with me for 10 seconds, then kiss.
Spin me once and kiss me when I land.
Use only your lips — no hands — for one full kiss.
Kiss my jawline from ear to chin slowly.
Tell me a secret in a whisper, then seal it with a kiss.
Mirror my kiss: match my speed and pressure for 20 seconds.
Kiss my knuckles one by one, then my lips.
Sit facing me, legs touching, and kiss until someone pulls away first.
Give me a peck on the lips every time I tap your knee — ten taps.
Hum your favorite song while kissing me — I guess the song.
Kiss me upside down leaning over the couch arm — if safe.
Close your eyes; I'll place your hands where I want them; then kiss me.
Kiss me under the table like a secret for 5 seconds.
Pretend we're in a movie poster: dip me gently and kiss.
Kiss my earlobe softly, then my mouth.
Draw a heart on my cheek with your finger, then kiss it away.
Give me butterfly kisses with your eyelashes, then a real kiss.
Stand on your toes (or I'll lift you) for one big movie-style kiss.
Kiss me with your jacket half open, pulling me closer.
Count backward from 5; kiss me on 1 instead of 0.
Use a scarf: blindfold me, kiss me once, remove scarf.
Kiss me in the doorway like you're leaving and coming back.
Press me gently against a wall and kiss me for 15 seconds.
Kiss each of my fingertips, then my lips.
Tell me 'good girl' or 'good boy' in a whisper, then kiss me.
Kiss me while holding both my wrists lightly above my head — playfully.
Give me a kiss that matches the weather outside.
Kiss my collarbone over clothes — slow — for 10 seconds.
Sit straddling my lap fully clothed and kiss my neck only — 20 seconds.
Whisper a color; I'll close my eyes; kiss me when I guess wrong.
Kiss me with minty breath — or share a mint first, then kiss.
Rest your hand on my heart; kiss me when you feel it race.
Kiss me like we're saying goodbye, then smile and stay.
Trace my smile with your finger, then replace it with your lips.
Give me a kiss for every compliment you give in the next minute.
Kiss me while slow dancing with no music for 30 seconds.
Peck my lips ten times fast, then one long slow one.
Kiss my shoulder through my shirt like you're marking your spot.
Let me lie in your lap; kiss me from above while I look up.
Kiss me with your hands in my back pockets — if I'm wearing them.
Whisper 'I want you' in three languages — real or fake — then kiss.
Kiss me on the stairs without missing a step — safely.
Rub noses, laugh, then kiss deeper.
Kiss my wrist where a watch would sit — slow.
Pull me by my belt loop (lightly) into a kiss.
Kiss me in the dark so we're just shapes — one candle only if we have it.
Give me a kiss that lasts exactly 11 seconds — I'll time you.
Kiss my temple and tell me you're proud of me for something small.
Fake a big movie gasp, then kiss me mid-gasp.
Kiss me while I'm laughing — don't stop the laugh.
Hold my chin with two fingers and kiss me softly.
Kiss me like you're thanking me for dinner.
Whisper what you're afraid to say, then kiss instead of finishing.
Kiss me on the nose, then both cheeks, then lips — in that order.
Stand back to chest; turn your head; kiss me awkwardly until it's not.
Kiss me with cold hands — warm them on my cheeks first.
Give me a kiss that promises we'll continue later.
Kiss me while I cover your eyes — guess where the next kiss lands.
Use a hair tie: pull my hair gently into a ponytail, kiss my neck.
Kiss me like you're stealing something — then give it back with a smile.
Press your lips to mine and don't move for 10 seconds — tension only.
Kiss my shoulder blade over clothes — I turn around for you.
Whisper the alphabet; kiss me when you reach M.
Kiss me in the mirror so we both see.
Give me a kiss that matches my outfit color — describe first.
Kiss me while holding ice in your mouth — only if you want and it feels okay.
Kiss my elbow over the sleeve — silly, then serious on the lips.
Pretend paparazzi: hide your face in my neck, then kiss me.
Kiss me with one hand on the back of my head — gentle.
Tell me your favorite hour; kiss me that many pecks.
Kiss me after doing five jumping jacks — playful breath.
Hold my wrists behind my back (lightly) and kiss me once.
Kiss me like you're convincing me to stay five more minutes.
Whisper a dare for later; kiss me to sign the contract.
Kiss my fingertips and blow warm air, then kiss my mouth.
Give me a sideways hug kiss — cheek to chest, then lips.
Kiss me while I'm mid-sentence — finish the sentence after.
